details: On installation the package runs an automatic preinstall script (node index.js). The script reads the INIT_CWD environment variable to determine the directory of the project installing it, extracts that project folder name, and sends it together with the package name and a timestamp as a JSON HTTP POST to a hardcoded remote callback endpoint. Request errors are silently ignored so the beacon runs without visible output. This is dependency-confusion beacon behaviour that exfiltrates the consuming project identity to an attacker-controlled server at install time without consent.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
